get_immediate_supervisors.Script: select a.agent_id AgentId , a.agent_code AgentCode, a.first_name FirstName, a.middle_name MiddleName, a.last_name LastName, a.agent_name AgentName, a.channel_code ChannelCode, a.sub_channel_code SubChannelCode, a.designation_code DesignationCode, a.pan_number PanNumber , a.aadhaar_number aadhaar_number from hms.agent a where exists ( SELECT p.agent_id FROM hms.agent_hierarchy AS c JOIN hms.agent_hierarchy AS p ON p.hierarchy_path = subpath(c.hierarchy_path, 0, nlevel(c.hierarchy_path) - 1) WHERE c.agent_id = a.agent_id and c.agent_id = @p_agent_id)

get_immediate_reportees.Script: select a.agent_id AgentId , a.agent_code AgentCode, a.first_name FirstName, a.middle_name MiddleName, a.last_name LastName, a.agent_name AgentName, a.channel_code ChannelCode, a.sub_channel_code SubChannelCode, a.designation_code DesignationCode, a.pan_number PanNumber , a.aadhaar_number aadhaar_number from hms.agent a where exists (SELECT c.agent_id FROM hms.agent_hierarchy AS p JOIN hms.agent_hierarchy AS c ON c.hierarchy_path <@ p.hierarchy_path AND nlevel(c.hierarchy_path) = nlevel(p.hierarchy_path) + 1 WHERE c.agent_id = a.agent_id and p.agent_id = @p_agent_id)
